title: Extract shared SmeltableMapping class to eliminate OutputItem drift
description:
The ore→ingot mapping currently exists in two places: SmeltGoal.OutputItem (for IsComplete) and DecomposeSmeltItem (for inputBlock reverse mapping). Extract a shared SmeltableMapping static class in Agent.Core or Agent.Planning that provides OutputFor(input), InputFor(output), and IsSmeltable(item) in one place. This prevents drift where one mapping gets updated but the other doesn't.

Council confidence: 88%. Severity: Medium (P1). Will cause a P1 bug within 2-3 sprints if not consolidated.
